title: Bhubaneswar、Odisha — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Bhubaneswar、Odisha的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Bhubaneswar是Odisha的一个城市，人口约1,200,000。The capital of Odisha, known as the Temple City for its thousand-year-old temples, and a growing IT and education hub.
